resumen: I am developing a web platform for the efficient management of patients, appointments, records . . .
descripcion_larga: I am developing a web platform for the efficient management of patients, appointments, clinical records, and session notes, optimizing the administrative workload for mental health professionals.

resumen: A web application designed to demonstrate my progress and command of fundamental frontend technologies . . .
descripcion_larga: A web application designed to demonstrate my progress and command of fundamental frontend technologies. Although initially developed with HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript, it is conceived as an evolving project. Currently, it serves as the foundation for future framework integrations and expansion into Full Stack capabilities, reflecting my continuous learning process.

resumen: Development of a multi-page website for a (fictitious) company, simulating a professional environment. Demonstrating . . .
descripcion_larga: This project was developed as the final delivery for the CoderHouse Web Development course, with the goal of simulating a real e-commerce environment for a fictitious fruit polishing brand. The platform features a multi-page architecture that organizes services, products, and an interactive customer area. It implements a fully responsive design that ensures smooth navigation on any device, along with a dynamic and functional shopping cart that utilizes LocalStorage for data persistence. Additionally, it integrates a real-time review system with visual validation, highlighting a strong focus on user experience (UX) and technical precision in the front-end.
tecnologias: HTML5, CSS3, SASS, JavaScript, Bootstrap 5, LocalStorage

resumen: Project created to build a budget simulator for a construction materials warehouse . . .
descripcion_larga:
This project was developed as the final delivery for the CoderHouse JavaScript course, aimed at solving the complexity of construction material quoting through a dynamic and efficient simulator. Unlike a static e-commerce, this platform uses an asynchronous data-driven architecture (Fetch API) that consumes a catalog from a local JSON file, allowing stock updates without modifying the source code.

The system implements robust business logic including automatic tax calculation (VAT), subtotals, and totals in real-time, with cart state management using LocalStorage to ensure data persistence. It stands out for its advanced interactivity, integrating dynamic category filters, intelligent quantity controls, and a polished user experience (UX) using the SweetAlert2 library for validations and visual feedback. All developed under a fully responsive design oriented towards technical clarity and operational efficiency in the construction sector.
tecnologias: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, LocalStorage, Fetch API, SweetAlert2, JSON
